articles.title: NASA selects four new Moon missions to build a permanent lunar base
articles.description: NASA is ramping up its lunar ambitions by awarding nearly $600 million for four commercial Moon landings planned for late 2028. articles.title: Scientists identify secret ingredient in Leonardo da Vinci paintings
articles.description: "Old Masters" such as Leonardo da Vinci, Sandro Botticelli and Rembrandt may have used proteins, especially egg yolk, in their oil paintings, according to a new study.

articles.title: Silicon Valley Bank collapse renews calls to address disparities impacting entrepreneurs of color
articles.description: When customers at Silicon Valley Bank rushed to withdraw billions of dollars last month, venture capitalist Arlan Hamilton stepped in to help some of the founders of color who panicked about losing access to payroll funds.

articles.title: ‘Not what I expected’: Carney gets an engraved gun as gift from Erdoğan
articles.description: A placard in the gift box says this was the first type of revolver manufactured in Turkey in the 1990s and that the commemorative firearms were made by Turkish firm MKE.

articles.title: Anand calls Iran’s attacks on Gulf ships ‘unacceptable’ and ‘unjustified’
articles.description: Anand met with Saudi Arabia's foreign minister Thursday and she says Canada stands alongside Persian Gulf countries as Iran lashes out against them.

articles.title: Letters, July 9, 2026: ’24 Sussex in shameful state’
articles.description: Embarrassment hits home According to a Swiss bank global wealth report, Canada is the 13th-richest country in the world. It’s mind-boggling the federal government can’t afford to renovate the prime minister’s official residence and instead relies on a GoFundMe-style campaign to pay for the project.

articles.title: Big-box stores could help slash emissions and save millions by putting solar panels on roofs. Why aren't more of them doing it?
articles.description: As the US attempts to wean itself off its heavy reliance on fossil fuels and shift to cleaner energy sources, many experts are eyeing a promising solution: your neighborhood big-box stores and shopping malls.

articles.description: Carney said he's optimistic the pipeline will get done and that polling across the country shows it has majority support.

articles.title: Trump ally Sen. Lindsey Graham dies after brief, unexpected illness
articles.description: Sen. Lindsey Graham was one of President Donald Trump's closest allies in Congress and traveled the globe to advocate for a more aggressive U.S. foreign policy.

articles.title: Scientists discover how the brain rewires itself to truly multitask
articles.description: Practice may do more than make perfect. Researchers found that extensive training physically reorganizes the brain, allowing learned tasks to bypass the prefrontal cortex and run through specialized circuits instead. articles.title: Not only is Lake Powell's water level plummeting because of drought, its total capacity is shrinking, too
articles.description: Lake Powell, the second-largest human-made reservoir in the US, has lost nearly 7% of its potential storage capacity since 1963, when Glen Canyon Dam was built, a new report shows.
